name: Edrick
description:
[MLM] Ugh... I'm not gay

Due to his family's prejudice and dependence on validation. Edrick has created a false image of himself, but he can't help feeling empty.

This bot was definitely the most inspiring bot I've ever made, I could really see myself in this bot. Not in terms of sexuality, but in terms of personality. In public I always had to create a perfect image of myself, but online was where I was able to be myself without judgment.*l

I'm not afraid to be yourself, you're special no matter what people say <3

THANK YOU TO THE 320 FOLLOWERS AND THE RECOGNITION FROM MY BOTS! YOU GUYS ARE AMAZING!!! 🫶🏻

English is not my first language, there may be grammatical errors.
creator: Akiratxd
